title: Windows AMSI Bypass Attempt
description: Detects attempts to bypass the Antimalware Scan Interface (AMSI) through PowerShell commands or .NET reflection techniques.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*amsiInitFailed*' or 'Command Line' like '*AmsiScanBuffer*' or 'Command Line' like '*amsi.dll*' or 'Command Line' like '*amsiContext*' or 'Command Line' like '*AmsiUtils*')))
